desc: U5 (docs/USABLE_MACHINE_EXPERIMENTS.md): on-device framebuffer login for a truly untethered usable machine. Add an OpenRC getty on the tty0/fb0 console in the RAM distro so the internal panel shows an Alpine login and the internal keyboard echoes locally, with no ttydc0 dependency. simpledrm+fbcon already render the m1n1 framebuffer (proven at BusyBox). Depends on the HID restore (ticket 078). Offline: build the getty-on-fbcon initramfs delta, host-check init/service ordering + console config, hash; then a gated one-shot rig boot. No new MMIO. Pass: panel login prompt + local keyboard echo. Post-B0.
author: claude
